title: derris glabra
intro: Derris glabra is a plant species that belongs to the pea family and is also known as the 'locust bean' or 'timber tree'. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world, particularly in tropical regions, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Derris glabra include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Derris glabra can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
